notes: Small focused file (132 lines, 7 decls) that lifts the elliptic-curve point functor to `AddMonoidHom` level using mathlib's `map_nonsingular`, `map_negY`, `map_addX/Y`, and `map_slope`. No sorries or maxHeartbeats overrides; `map_add` is the only non-trivial proof (~33 lines of case analysis). `map_neg` and `map_zsmul` are exported API unused within the file itself, likely consumed by other project files.
